{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.6": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The rewrite is a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning. It addresses all the main issues identified and improves readability significantly.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, providing detailed explanations of what needs to be verified or clarified. This includes assumptions about model outputs, confidence scores, and experimental design details.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all aspects of the protocol, data, models, recorded variables, metrics, and results without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The rewrite avoids introducing new errors or harmful content. It identifies potential issues in the original text and suggests improvements to avoid downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications made to the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.6": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.6: The rewrite is a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning. It addresses all the main issues identified and improves readability significantly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, providing detailed explanations of what needs to be verified or clarified. This includes assumptions about model outputs, confidence scores, and experimental design details.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all aspects of the protocol, data, models, recorded variables, metrics, and results without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors or harmful content. It identifies potential issues in the original text and suggests improvements to avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications made to the original text.
